generator_prompt_injection:
REAL TEST-TAKER INSIGHTS (sourced from r/Sat, updated 2026-05-09):
- Coverage: Real test-takers report this exam covers breadth over depth. Stay at college 101 level on each topic.
- High-emphasis topics (per real students): math, english, r w.
- Students struggle most with: inferences, command of evidence, words in context. Generate proportionally more on these.
- Wording style: ~9% of items should use realistic exam-style indirection (NOT unfair ambiguity).
- Difficulty target: 15% easy / 50% medium / 35% hard. avg pass score 1483 — harder test.
- Authenticity bar: students compare us to A Song of Ice and Fire series, The Godfather, cough drops. Match that register.
